scenes.background_description: Modern sustainable city with green buildings, solar panels on rooftops, clean energy infrastructure
scenes.dialogue: Climate change requires immediate action, but we have powerful solutions at our fingertips.

scenes.background_description: Wind farm on rolling green hills with large white wind turbines spinning in blue sky
scenes.dialogue: Renewable energy like wind and solar power can replace fossil fuels completely.

scenes.background_description: Lush green forest with diverse wildlife, birds flying, natural ecosystem thriving
scenes.dialogue: Protecting and restoring forests captures carbon while preserving biodiversity.

scenes.background_description: Modern classroom with students learning about sustainability, environmental education posters
scenes.dialogue: Education empowers the next generation to build a sustainable future for everyone.
